action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py fails with torch.load weights_only error due to numpy scalars in checkpoint. Analysis: PyTorch 2.6 defaults to weights_only=True. Need to set weights_only=False. Decision: Fix predict.py and submit eval with current best checkpoint.
